title: Composition of the fund
doc_html:
§3102.  Composition of the fund

From July 31, 1940, the funds, proceeds, and revenues hereinafter provided for shall constitute the Firemen's Pension and Relief Fund of the City of Alexandria, to be used for the purposes set forth in R.S. 11:3101, and in accordance with the provisions hereinafter contained.  

Designated from Acts 1940, No. 12, §2 by Acts 1991, No. 74, §3, eff. June 25, 1991.
